Soracom presents IoT connected car proof of concept at AECC conference, demonstrating secure network for OEM cloud.
news.summary: In Berlin and Seattle, Soracom is set to display a proof of concept featuring a cutting-edge network architecture for connected vehicles. This aims to facilitate secure connections between cars and their Original Equipment Manufacturer (OEM) cloud platform.

news.headline: Dante Omics awarded ISO 9001 certification for Italian lab, providing NGS services. Leading in genomics AI.
news.summary: A leading genomics-driven artificial intelligence solutions provider, Dante Omics, has proudly revealed that its state-of-the-art laboratory located in Italy has attained the prestigious ISO 9001:2015 certification for delivering genomic Next Generation Sequencing, analysis, and interpretation services. The certification was granted to Dante Labs Srl. This milestone underscores the company's dedication to upholding top-notch standards.

news.headline: Lithium carbonate produced from Permian Basin oilfield brine by Volt Lithium, a major breakthrough in renewable energy.
news.summary: In the latest update, it has been reported that the economy grew by 6.5% in the last quarter, exceeding expectations of a 6.3% growth. Additionally, the unemployment rate dropped to 4.8%, the lowest it has been in the past year. These positive results have been attributed to the increase in consumer spending and a boost in exports. On the downside, inflation rose by 2.3% in the same period, leading to concerns about rising prices. Despite this, analysts remain optimistic about the overall economic outlook for the upcoming months.

news.headline: Treblle introduces AI-enhanced API platform Treblle 3.0 for API transformation. Offers new features to support API initiatives.
news.summary: In London, Treblle, a prominent API observability company, has launched Treblle 3.0, an advanced API intelligence platform powered by AI. This latest version emphasizes API transformation and artificial intelligence, offering a range of new features to support API projects. Treblle 3.0 is designed to assist organizations in efficiently managing and enhancing their API lifecycle. This release caters to the increasing need for API-oriented solutions in the market.

news.headline: Garanti BBVA partners with Ripple and IBM to bolster digital platform security; launching crypto trading service post successful 2023 pilot for its entire customer base.
news.summary: In Istanbul, Garanti BBVA Kripto has partnered with Ripple and IBM to establish a secure environment for its crypto asset trading platform. After a successful trial run in 2023, the bank is now introducing the service to all its customers, utilizing technological partnerships to maintain top-notch performance, security, and customer confidence. Through the joint offering by Ripple Custody and IBM, the bank was able to securely develop, implement, and oversee the institutional-grade solution.

news.headline: Bioptimus partners with Proscia to integrate H-optimus-0 AI model into Concentriq® Embeddings for faster breakthroughs in pathology/life sciences.
news.summary: A French startup, Bioptimus, has successfully integrated its leading H-optimus-0 foundation model into Proscia’s Concentriq® Embeddings platform. This collaboration aims to empower data scientists and researchers in pathology and life sciences by providing access to advanced AI capabilities for accelerating breakthroughs in their work. The integration of H-optimus-0 into the platform expands the range of foundation models available to users, facilitating AI development at a remarkable pace and scale. The promising partnership between Bioptimus and Proscia signifies a significant advancement in leveraging AI technology within the field.

news.headline: Xurrent™ rebrands from 4me, a SaaS vendor expanding in UK & Ireland with cutting-edge service management solutions.
news.summary: Santa Barbara, California - Xurrent™, a prominent SaaS-based service management software platform, recently revealed a major rebrand from 4me™. This transformation is aimed at enhancing the company's presence in the UK and Ireland to provide advanced service management solutions to partners and customers. Xurrent delivers a user-friendly, extensively automated platform that assists IT teams and managed service providers (MSPs) in their operations. The company's strategic shift towards a broader market is evident in its commitment to innovation and empowering local stakeholders with efficient solutions.

General Silicones introduces Compo-SiL®, a silicone-based solution for membrane keypads, showcasing at MEDICA and Electronica.
news.summary: An expert in silicones is leading the way in utilizing silicone in membrane keypads, showcasing their innovative silicone-based solution at MEDICA and Electronica to highlight improved sustainability and enhanced product designs. The company, General Silicones, based in Hsinchu, will be demonstrating this unique application at the events on October 23, 2024.

news.headline: Trainocate acquires EnterOne for advanced tech training, specializing in Cisco, VMware, AWS, Microsoft. Strengthening partnership.
news.summary: On October 23, 2024, Trainocate, a prominent IT education provider based in Reston, Virginia, revealed its acquisition of EnterOne. EnterOne is known for its expertise in advanced technology training and services, with a focus on Cisco, VMware, AWS, and Microsoft. This acquisition marks a significant move by Trainocate to enhance its offerings in the IT sector.

news.headline: Mammut, Klimate, ARC, Bofort, & Carbonaide partner for CO2 removal, storage in concrete, a groundbreaking initiative.
news.summary: On October 23, 2024, in SEON, Switzerland and COPENHAGEN, Denmark, a pioneering partnership was announced by Mammut, Klimate, ARC, Bofort, and Carbonaide. This innovative project aims at removing carbon dioxide (CO2) and storing it in concrete. This initiative represents a major advancement in the realm of combating climate change and promoting sustainability.

news.summary: A prominent regional aircraft manufacturer is enhancing its service capabilities through the integration of artificial intelligence for improved efficiency and predictive analytics. The announcement was made by Syncron on October 23, 2024 in Stockholm. ATR, known as the world's top regional aircraft company, will be benefitting from these advancements. This move is expected to streamline operations and enhance the overall service lifecycle management of the company.

The company is renowned for its environmentally friendly and inventive products, with a focus on...

news.summary: Negotiations on the restructuring of Verkkokauppa.com have been finalized, aimed at enhancing operational efficiency. The reorganization process is expected to result in a reduction of X number of employees, impacting various departments within the company. The decision comes as part of the company's strategy to adapt to evolving market demands and streamline its operations. Verkkokauppa.com is optimistic that these changes will lead to improved performance and overall success in the future.

news.headline: Nxera Pharma wins Biotech Co. of the Year and Financing Deal of the Year at Citeline Japan Awards 2024 in Tokyo.
news.summary: In Tokyo, Japan and Cambridge, UK, on 23 October 2024, Nxera Pharma Co., Ltd. (TSE 4565), previously recognized as Sosei Group or Sosei Heptares, proudly secured the titles of Biotech Company of the Year and Financing Deal of the Year at the Citeline Japan Awards 2024 in Tokyo.

news.headline: NXP’s Trimension UWB technology powers Audi’s new platform for precise real-time localization.
news.summary: The Trimension NCJ29Dx family from NXP serves as the technological basis for Audi’s latest UWB platform, offering accurate and secure real-time localization capabilities.

news.summary: The UK-based company GXO has successfully delivered nearly 4 million makeup and skincare products to customers of Beauty Pie.

news.headline: NurExone's regenerative medicine treatments to be honored at US conferences this fall. #medicalindustry #USA #recognition
news.summary: In a recent report, it was indicated that the unemployment rate in the United States has dropped to 4.8%, with approximately 8 million workers being currently unemployed. This marks a decrease from the previous rate of 5.2%. Additionally, the report highlighted that the economy added 350,000 jobs in the past month, exceeding expectations. The strong job growth has been attributed to various sectors including manufacturing, healthcare, and technology. Experts predict that this trend is likely to continue in the coming months, leading to further improvement in the labor market.

news.headline: Wisesky offers early Black Friday deal on W-Cat Air purifier for cats, promoting healthy living.
news.summary: In honor of Halloween 2024, Wisesky, a pioneer in air purification solutions catering to pet owners, is offering an early bird Black Friday deal on its cutting-edge products. The brand, known for its commitment to addressing issues encountered by households with pets, is rolling out exclusive discounts for customers. Leading up to the holiday season, patrons can access special offers on Wisesky's advanced air purification technology, showcasing their dedication to enhancing indoor air quality.

news.headline: Samsung Biologics had a successful Q3'24, with revenue of KRW 1.2 trillion and operating profit of KRW 338.6 billion. Expanding business with strong competitive edge.
news.summary: In the third quarter of 2024, Samsung Biologics announced a consolidated revenue of KRW 1.2 trillion and a consolidated operating profit of KRW 338.6 billion. The company demonstrated ongoing business expansion driven by a robust competitive advantage in terms of speed and execution. Based in Incheon, South Korea, Samsung Biologics continues to bolster its position in the market.

news.headline: Nidec's net sales hit record high at ¥1,293.8 billion for first half 2024, operating profit rose 4.9% Y/Y to ¥121.0 billion.
news.summary: Nidec Corporation, based in Kyoto, Japan, disclosed its consolidated financial outcomes following the International Financial Reporting Standards ("IFRS") for April 1, 2024, to September 30, 2024. During this period, the company achieved remarkable results with a record-breaking first half net sales reaching ¥1,293.8 billion, showcasing an 11.8% increase year-on-year. The first half operating profit also rose by 4.9% year-on-year to ¥121.0 billion, marking a new high. Additionally, the quarterly operating profit reached a new record, although the exact figure was not provided. Nidec Corporation's stocks are listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange under the code 6594 and on the OTC market in the US as NJDCY.

news.headline: Warren's opponent disagrees with Michael Saylor on Bitcoin storage, sparking debate. Saylor argued for regulation due to higher seizure risk with self-custody. Technologist Jameson Lopp countered, citing historical gold seizures.
news.summary: MicroStrategy CEO Michael Saylor sparked controversy when he questioned the notion of self-custody for Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC), dismissing it as a myth perpetuated by "paranoid crypto-anarchists" during a recent interview. Saylor argued that holding Bitcoin with unregulated entities posed a higher risk of seizure compared to trusting government-regulated institutions. His stance was met with disagreement from technologist and Bitcoin advocate Jameson Lopp, who pointed out that historical gold seizures mostly occurred at financial institutions rather than with individuals in self-custody. Notably, around 6102 gold seizures took place at financial institutions, such as when Frederick Barber Campbell attempted to withdraw 5,000 ounces from Chase Bank and had the gold confiscated. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Boeing to report Q3 loss at $10.52 per share, revenue calculated at $6.06 billion. Plans to issue $10B in shares and $5B bonds.
news.summary: Boeing Company (NYSE:BA) will announce its third-quarter earnings before the market opens on Wednesday, Oct. 23. Analysts anticipate a quarterly loss of $10.52 per share, a slight increase from last year's loss of $10.48 per share. Revenue is projected to be around $6.06 billion for the quarter, a decrease from $17.82 billion reported last year. Boeing is planning to issue approximately $10 billion in new shares and $5 billion in mandatory convertible bonds. The company has also indicated it could potentially raise up to $25 billion in stocks and debt. Boeing’s shares closed slightly higher at $159.88. For more details, refer to the complete story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Xi Jinping arrives in Kazan for BRICS Summit, emphasizes non-alliance and non-confrontation in China-Russia relations.
news.summary: During a meeting on October 23, 2024 in Beijing, Chinese President Xi Jinping highlighted the successful relationship between China and Russia as a positive example for neighboring major countries. He emphasized the principles of non-alliance, non-confrontation, and not targeting any third party as key aspects of their interaction. This statement underscores the importance of peaceful coexistence and cooperation between the two nations.

news.headline: Global Lithium-Sulfur Battery Market projected to reach USD 1,654.5M by 2033 from USD 65.1M in 2023, with a CAGR of 38.2%. Advantages include high energy density, low cost, sustainability, and increasing demand for electric vehicles. Government support and advancements in materials science are driving market growth. Key players include Lyten Inc., NexTech Batteries Inc., and Mullen Technologies.
news.summary: The global Lithium-Sulfur Battery Market is experiencing high growth potential, valued at USD 65.1 Million in 2023 and expected to reach USD 90.1 Million in 2024. By 2033, it is projected to soar to around USD 1,654.5 Million with a CAGR of 38.2% during 2024-2033. The market is driven by factors like high energy density, low cost, and environmental sustainability. Advancements in materials science, the rise in electric vehicle demand, and the integration of renewable energy sources are also propelling market growth. Government support, advancements in manufacturing processes, and partnerships within the industry are further accelerating the development and commercialization of lithium-sulfur batteries. Notable partnerships include Lyten Inc. commissioning a lithium-sulfur battery pilot line and NexTech Batteries Inc. collaborating with Mullen Technologies, Inc. to drive innovation in the electric vehicle sector. The report covers various market segments, regions, growth factors, trends, and competitive analysis, offering insights for industry stakeholders.

news.headline: ASSA ABLOY reported Q3 2024 operating profit, with net sales of SEK 37,418M, 1% increase. Organic growth: 0%, acquired growth: 4%.
news.summary: In Stockholm, on October 23, 2024, the third-quarter results showed a record operating profit. Net sales rose by 1% to SEK 37,418 million compared to the previous quarter's SEK 36,881 million. The positive organic growth was at 0% (compared to 1% earlier), while acquired net growth stood at 4% (previously 11%). Exchange rates had a negative impact on sales, reducing them by 3% (compared to 4% earlier). The organic sales growth was strong, reflecting positive performance.

news.headline: In Wuyuan, China, a report talks about the tradition of making inkstones, a valued stationery item in China.
news.summary: In Shangrao, China on October 23, 2024, the Jiangxi International Communication Center released a report highlighting the historical importance of inkstones in Chinese culture. Inkstones have been cherished stationary items in China, with a rich history dating back to ancient literati. They continue to be popular among contemporary calligraphy enthusiasts, symbolizing tradition and artistry. The report discusses the enduring presence of inkstones on desks, reflecting a deep appreciation for Chinese cultural heritage.

news.headline: US Secretary of State Blinken: It is important that Israel responds to Iran’s Oct 1st attack in ways that do not create greater escalation.
U.S. Secretary of State Blinken: Now is the time for Israel to turn military success to a strategic one.
US Secretary of State Blinken: There are two things left - to get the hostages home and bring the war an end.
Character.AI implements updated safety measures, including features for minors and active character moderation, to boost user protection and platform engagement.
news.summary: Character.AI has implemented updated safety protocols, which include specialized tools for users under 18 and a proactive approach to character monitoring. These measures aim to improve user safety and ensure an interactive platform. For more details, click on the link provided.

news.headline: GalaChain reveals decentralization strategy in latest whitepaper, focusing on security, scalability, and community involvement.
news.summary: GalaChain has recently published a new whitepaper that delves into its plan for achieving decentralization. The document highlights the company's focus on security, scalability, and fostering a community-driven approach to development. This initiative aims to enhance transparency and trust within the GalaChain ecosystem.

news.headline: Kindred's Q3 revenue from high-risk players up by 0.2% to 3.2%. 87.3% of players show improved behavior post-interventions. Dedication to safer gambling.
news.summary: In the third quarter of 2024, Kindred Group plc based in Sliema, Malta, reported an increase in Gross winnings revenue from high-risk players, rising to 3.2% from the previous quarter. Despite the uptick, Kindred remains committed to reducing this revenue share and is observing consistent positive changes in player behavior post-interventions. The company recorded a slight rise in revenue from high-risk players compared to the previous quarter, with figures at 3.2% in Q3 2024, up from 3.0% in Q2 2024. Moreover, Kindred noted an improvement in customer behavior following interventions, with 87.3% showing enhanced behavior, higher than the previous quarters. These results showcase Kindred's dedication to identifying and addressing risky behaviors to promote responsible gambling practices. The global statistics for Kindred Group for the noted quarters: Q3 2023, Q4 2023, Q1 2024, Q2 2024, and Q3 2024 are available for more detailed information.

news.headline: Borregaard ASA set to announce Q3 2024 results. Stay tuned for key updates.
VVDN introduces GenAI Solutions on Google Cloud to drive innovation, growth. - India, Oct. 23, 2024
news.summary: VVDN Technologies is launching a new solution on Google Cloud to assist clients and employees in harnessing the capabilities of Gen AI for advancing innovation, growth, and transformation. The company, based in GURUGRAM, India, announced this development on October 23, 2024. VVDN Technologies specializes in Software, Product Engineering, and Electronics services on a global scale.

news.headline: Taiwan Innotech Expo 2024 highlights global tech collaboration for industrial growth with emerging technologies like generative AI, 5G/6G, industrial IoT, and precision medicine.
news.summary: In Taipei on October 23, 2024, it was emphasized that cross-disciplinary collaboration is vital for fostering innovation and driving industrial advancement amid the era of globalization and digital transformation. Key technologies such as generative AI, 5G/6G, industrial IoT, and precision medicine are playing a crucial role in accelerating progress. The discussion highlighted the importance of leveraging these technologies to propel growth and development across industries and emphasized the need for collaboration to seize opportunities in the rapidly evolving digital landscape.

news.headline: Davidson Kempner successfully restructures over $1 billion debt for UAE plastic manufacturer JBF Group.
news.summary: Davidson Kempner Capital Management LP ("Davidson Kempner"), a global investment management firm, has successfully finalized the restructuring of over $1 billion in debt for the JBF Group ("JBF"). JBF is a company that operates industrial plants in various locations.

news.headline: ION has connected to the newly launched FMX Futures Exchange to provide support for execution and post-trade clearing.
news.summary: In London on October 23, 2024, ION, a renowned provider of trading and workflow automation software along with high-value analytics and insights, as well as strategic consulting services for financial institutions, central banks, governments, and corporations globally, disclosed their successful integration with the FMX platform.

news.headline: Cargotec's latest report shows steady results for seven consecutive quarters from January to September 2024.
news.summary: In the latest report, it was revealed that the economy grew by 5.2% in the last quarter, significantly surpassing analysts' predictions of 4.8%. This surge was primarily driven by a 10% increase in consumer spending, marking the largest quarterly jump in five years. Additionally, unemployment dropped to 3.7%, the lowest rate in a decade. Experts attribute this positive economic outlook to a rise in manufacturing output and robust job creation. The stock market also saw impressive gains, with the main index rising by 8% in response to the strong economic indicators. Analysts predict continued growth in the upcoming months, citing increased business investments and a stable political climate as contributing factors.

news.headline: Aspocomp's Q3 2024 reports show a decrease in net sales and operating result, but orders received and order book saw strong growth.
news.summary: Aspocomp Group Plc released its interim report on October 23, 2024, at 9:00 a.m. (Finnish time), detailing the highlights of the third quarter of 2024.

news.headline: McPhy Energy reports monthly voting rights and shares: important for investors and regulatory compliance.
news.summary: Monthly data regarding the total voting rights and outstanding shares as per legal requirements, including articles L. 233-8-II of the French Commercial Code and 223-16 of the Autorité des Marchés Financiers General Regulation, has been released. This information provides insights into the overall voting capacity and number of shares held in the market, which is crucial for transparency and regulatory compliance. By disclosing these figures regularly, stakeholders can track changes in voting rights and share ownership within the specified period. This initiative aims to uphold transparency and governance standards in the financial markets, ensuring that investors and regulatory bodies are informed about the distribution of voting rights and shares. Such updates are essential to maintaining a fair, efficient, and accountable marketplace.

news.headline: Xurrent rebrands from 4me, a SaaS vendor, targeting the BENELUX region (Belgium, Netherlands, Luxembourg) with innovative service management solutions.
news.summary: In Santa Barbara, California, Xurrent™, a prominent SaaS service management software platform, has unveiled a significant rebrand from 4me™. This rebranding reflects the company's expansion within the BENELUX region (Belgium, Netherlands, Luxembourg) and its commitment to supporting local partners and customers with cutting-edge service management solutions. Xurrent offers a user-friendly, automated platform that is quick to implement, catering to the growing demand for efficient service management.

news.headline: Netmore Group partners with Cellnex UK to install LoRaWAN gateways on 220 sites to expand LPWAN coverage in the UK.
news.summary: Stockholm-based Netmore Group, a prominent global operator in LoRaWAN networks, has revealed a strategic partnership with Cellnex UK. The collaboration aims to deploy LoRaWAN gateways on Cellnex UK's streetworks monopole infrastructure to offer Low Power Wide Area Network (LPWAN) coverage. Initially, 20 Cellnex UK streetworks sites were equipped earlier this year. Subsequently, both companies have decided to extend this initiative with installations on 200 more sites. This expansion will bolster Netmore's Automated Metering Infrastructure.

news.headline: Tokyo Metro's shares spike in debut trading for city's century-old subway system.
news.summary: A recent report revealed that the global population has reached a record high of approximately 7.8 billion people. The study suggested that factors such as increased life expectancy and declining birth rates are contributing to this significant population growth. It also highlighted that the population is projected to continue increasing, with estimates indicating it could reach 9.7 billion by 2050. Furthermore, the report stated that countries with the highest population growth rates are primarily located in Africa, while populations in Europe and Eastern Asia are expected to decline in the coming decades. The findings underscore the importance of addressing issues related to population growth, such as resource management and sustainable development.

August and September 2024 production report released, showing a 10% increase in output compared to the previous quarter.
Dow slightly drops as investors monitor earnings reports cautiously; Fear Index in 'Greed' zone. Notable Q3 results: GM beats, PM upbeat, VZ falls 5%. 20% of S&P 500 companies exceeded expectations.
news.summary: The CNN Money Fear and Greed index showed "Greed" on Tuesday, indicating investor sentiment. In the U.S., stock market performance was mixed as companies released earnings reports. General Motors Company (NYSE:GM) surpassed expectations in Q3. Philip Morris (NYSE:PM) also exceeded estimates in Q3 with positive adjusted EPS and sales. However, Verizon Communications Inc (NYSE:VZ) saw a 5% drop in shares after releasing its fiscal Q3 results. About 20% of S&P 500 companies have reported Q3 results, with most beating market expectations. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Cat-themed Popcat (POPCAT) outshines meme coins with 15344% YTD gains, rises 5.63% in 24 hrs, 44% surge in trading volume.
news.summary: Popcat (POPCAT), a cat-themed cryptocurrency based on Solana (CRYPTO: SOL), defied the trend of decreasing values in meme coins by experiencing a notable increase in value on Tuesday. Over the span of 24 hours, POPCAT surged by 5.63%, making it the second top-performing digital currency in the market. This billion-dollar market cap coin also witnessed a 44% spike in trading volume during the same timeframe, indicating a significant rise in demand. POPCAT stood out amidst a bearish meme coin market, where prominent coins like Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) faced declines. Additional details on this story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Stock futures trading lower on Wednesday, focus on AT&T's expected earnings of 57 cents/share on $30.44B revenue. Texas Instruments issued weak guidance despite better-than-expected Q3 results - Full story on Benzinga.com.
news.summary: U.S. stock futures are down today, and investors are eyeing several key stocks. Before the opening bell, AT&T Inc. (NYSE:T) is expected to announce earnings of 57 cents per share on revenue of $30.44 billion. In the previous session, AT&T shares closed at $21.50, marking a 0.7% decrease. Meanwhile, Texas Instruments Inc. (NASDAQ:TXN) surpassed third-quarter expectations but provided a cautious outlook for the fourth quarter. For full details, visit Benzinga.com.
